TimeEntry.Title: File Server migration
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to FS02 server and tried V2V migration but it failed as hyper-V server crashed again. Troubleshot the hyper-V and restored its connectivity. As discussed with Kraig, build a new server FS-01

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Server access down
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to server another server, tried to acess HV01 via mstsc, but no accessible, so logged into IOL, found error in Storage, so rebooted HPE, after restart found HV online in my rempte, connected

TimeEntry.Title: Technijian tools installed on FS01 server
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into server. Installed all the technijian tools in the server. Also updated the machines with latest windows updates. Closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: File Server migration
TimeEntry.Notes: As per Kraig, copied data on FS01 server again as a new server with windows server 2022 is build again. All the folders have been copied except 'Projects', it is in progress.

TimeEntry.Title: Account Expiration Notice Wednesday, July 5, 2023
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the mail from Douglas. login into the o365 admin portal and Block a suspicious email and Domain. after that confirmation mail is sent to the user. Hence ticket has been closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Backup repo and added new job - VBR
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to Veeam server, removed the old repo which was pointed to Management Network. added new repo, created jobs and mounted repo, tested one test backup and it completed successfully with backup

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Network is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to FS01 and ping google getting RTO, so run advanced IP scanner, it showed IP conflicted with different device, so login into Firewall and reserved the IP and tested for 5 Minutes and No RTO

TimeEntry.Title: DC issues
TimeEntry.Notes: A new BDC (DC04) was created and is in service. DC01 is demoted cleanly. Changed DHCP DNS on Fortigate and applied necessary configuration.

TimeEntry.Title: VPN Issue
TimeEntry.Notes: Issue with LDAP Auth. on BWH's firewall. This issue is fixed.

TimeEntry.Title: Cannot access network drives
TimeEntry.Notes: User can ping servers but cannot access any network shares. IPCONFIG /renew and /flushdns did not resolve the problem. Final solution was to run "netsh int ip reset" then reboot PC. Confirmed with Ste

PDF files are corrupted.

TimeEntry.Title: HP Server Refreshing
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on the issue with RAID and expansion card, disassembled RAID controller and expansion card, checked the wiring, and reconnect everything and got the RAID working. all the drives are visible

TimeEntry.Title: Can't open PDF
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected the user's computer, discovered a problem with one PDF file (ACORD Form 20230227-152570.pdf), and fixed it. Users can now access files.

TimeEntry.Title: Excel help
TimeEntry.Notes: Got the email on support from Teresa, regarding excel hanging issue on machine. So connected to her machine. Remove temp files,Disk cleanup done in the machine. Increased virtual memory in machine.
